characters.name: Apple and Onion Chutney
characters.description: Apple and Onion Chutney is a new character according toAppledespite being an elaborate disguise he andOniondon after failing to springFalafelfrom jail in the episode “Falafel's in Jail” As can be seen, Apple notes that being mixed up with Onion as Chutney is “uncomfortable.” Onion‘s eyes are on the top middle and his ears are on the top right in the Chutney Jar while his mouth is located on the lower left side of the jar.  Apple’s eyes are in the lower middle of the jar while his mouth is located at the upper left but he was able to move his mouth to the upper right to speak on the telephone while Onion could hear the response from the same location. Positioned outside of the glass jar are Onion‘s left arm and right leg and Apple’s left leg and right arm.

characters.name: Beef Jerky
characters.description: Beef JerkyCharacteristicsRaceFood (Beef Jerky)GenderMalePersonal StatusRelative(s)UnknownFriend(s)AppleOnionBurritoMittensMediaFirst AppearancePilotVoice ActorKevin Michael Richardson "Beej" Beef Jerky(Or just Beef Jerky)is a minor character inApple & Onion. So far he has appeared in episodes4 on 1,Pancake's Bus Tour,Apple's Formula,The Music Store Thief,Pilot, and makes a brief appearance in theTheme Song. Despite his status as a prisoner and intimidating appearance, Beef Jerky is a positive and nice guy. He helpsAppleandOnionlearn life lessons and likes telling them stories of his past. He also appears to be a responsible prisoner, as he when his cell wall was destroyed he builds it back up because it's his home.

characters.name: Buffalo Mozzarella
characters.description: Buffalo MozzarellaFalafel's Fun DayFalafel's PassionCharacteristicsSpeciesBuffalo mozzarellaGenderMaleAgeAdultOrientationOpera singerAppearanceOutfitBritish suitPersonal StatusFriend(s)His fansAppleOnionFalafelMediaFirst Appearance"Falafel's Fun Day"OtherApple's BirthdayMusic Theme"I Love To Siiiiiiiiiiing!"Voice ActorKeith FergusonBuffalo Mozzarellais a minor character inApple & Onion.He first appeared in the episode "Falafel's Fun Day" and "Falafel's Passion". He is a dollop of white mozzarella who wears a light-blue British suit with a reddish bowtie and handkerchief and white pants. He also wears gray shoes. Not much is known about him, except that he is a famous opera singer who performs for many people at the opera house.

characters.name: Butter
characters.description: Butter is a female news anchor on a program known as “Butter News.” She first appears in “Heatwave” where she gradually melts given the intense heat. Later in “Falefel‘s in Jail,” Butter not so subtlety assumes on air thatFalafelis responsible for a recent string of headphone thefts, allowing the real thiefMeatball Wrapto go into hiding as Wrapper and Meatballs.

characters.name: Cheesesteak
characters.description: CheesesteakCharacteristicsSpeciesCheesesteak sandwichGenderMaleAgeAdultAppearanceOutfitBusiness suitTraitsComplexionBrownHairYellowPersonal StatusFriend(s)Fried ShrimpEnemy(s)Apple(formerly)Onion(formerly)Patty(formerly)Fried Shrimp(formerly)MediaFirst Appearance"Apple's In Trouble"Voice ActorDanny JacobsCheesesteakis a minor character inApple & Onion. He had an important part in "Apple's in Trouble". Cheesesteak is a tall cheesesteak sandwich who wears a green bowtie and hat. His jacket is the bun, his hair is the cheese, and the meat is his body. In addition, he wears gray shoes. AfterFried Shrimp'sfit with him, Cheesesteak starts to get angry as he walks out of the building. When he goes to theThe Dollar Store,Appletries to cheer him up, but ends up failing. Cheesesteak then threatens to turnAppleinto applesauce, but before he can do so, he realizes that he has to go to his job. He then tells Apple that the fight isn't over, making Apple scared.

characters.name: Chicken Nugget’s Mother
characters.description: Chicken Nugget’s Mother first appears in ”The Music Store Thief,” where she tries to wish her son a “Happy Birthday.” He rejects her wishing (along with contributing to a charity and food sampling) due to being in a stew overBeef Jerkypranking him and thefts from the Music Store he was hired to prevent as a security guard byIced Tea. Later she along with Apple, Onion, Beef Jerky, a few ofChicken Nugget’s Nuggetsand several others throw Chicken Nugget a birthday party at his jail with the instruments stolen from the Music Store by rats commanded by Beef Jerky.
